name: Brandied Cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash and drain the cranberries.
2 Place them in a jelly roll pan or on a cookie sheet with sides.
3 Sprinkle with sugar until the berries are covered.
4 Broil, stirring several times for the first few minutes, 6-8 inches below the burner.
5 Continue broiling until the berries have popped, which takes several minutes.
6 Pour into a storage container and add a generous amount of brandy.
7 Stir lightly, cover, and refrigerate.
8 Keeps indefinitely in the refrigerator. Good with turkey or chicken.
9 Makes about 6 cups.
